overall.description: Third-person gameplay from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt walking through a medieval riverside settlement, transitioning from narrow paths between timber houses and stone walls to wooden docks, ascending a cliffside staircase, and emerging into an open rural landscape with thatched cottages.

scene_state.functional_zone: riverside path between timber buildings and stone fortification wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path between wooden tavern buildings and a tall stone curtain wall

entered.detail: dark wooden medieval building with timber framing and red awning
tall gray stone fortification wall with crenellations
flowing blue-green river visible beyond the stone wall
wooden wagon with barrels parked beside the building
tall stone tower visible in the distance above the buildings

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a narrow dirt path between a timber-framed tavern on the left and a massive stone curtain wall on the right. The river is visible in the distance beyond the wall, and a wooden cart sits parked near the building entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden dock walkway along the riverside

events.description: dirt path transitions to wooden dock planks built along the water's edge

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden dock walkway passing barrels and beached boats

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming a walkway along the water
small wooden rowboat beached on the shore
rustic wooden hut with sloped roof near the water

segments.scene_description: The path becomes a wooden dock built directly along the river, with the stone wall still towering on the right. Geralt passes wooden barrels and a beached rowboat while the river flows alongside. A small wooden shed appears ahead near a distant stone arch.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy riverside path approaching stone arch bridge

events.description: wooden dock ends and ground returns to dirt and sand approaching a stone arch structure

agents.ego_description: walking along the sandy shore toward a large stone arch bridge

entered.detail: large stone bridge with multiple arches spanning the river canyon
rocky riverbank with boulders and sparse grass

segments.scene_description: Leaving the dock behind, the path returns to sandy dirt along the rocky shoreline. The stone arch bridge looms larger ahead as Geralt approaches, with the river still flowing on the right and timber buildings continuing on the left.

events.description: character begins ascending steep wooden stairs built into the cliffside

agents.ego_description: climbing wooden stairs built against the rock face, moving upward from the river level

entered.detail: steep wooden staircase with railings built into the cliff
mossy gray rock cliff wall rising vertically
weather vane with rooster figure atop a wooden post at the stairs' summit

segments.scene_description: Geralt turns left and begins ascending a steep wooden staircase built into the cliff face, leaving the river behind. The rock wall rises on the right while the timber buildings fall away to the left, with a weather vane visible at the top of the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: open rural countryside with thatched cottages

events.description: emerges from stairs into open rural landscape with cobblestone road and distant views

agents.ego_description: walking along the cobblestone path through the rural village outskirts

notable_agents.action: villager in red clothing walking along the path toward the character

entered.detail: worn cobblestone road winding through the countryside
traditional cottage with straw thatched roof and timber walls
expansive view of forests and mountains in the background
simple wooden post fence lining the path

segments.scene_description: Reaching the top of the stairs, the scene opens into a wide rural landscape with cobblestone paths and thatched cottages. A villager walks along the path ahead, and distant forests and mountains are visible under a bright sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a medieval settlement that transitions from a narrow alleyway into an open riverside dock. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt path squeezed between a timber-framed tavern and a massive stone curtain wall, with a parked wooden cart nearby. As the camera advances, the dirt terrain shifts into a wooden dock that runs directly alongside the flowing river. The scene then expands as Geralt passes by scattered barrels and a beached rowboat, while the towering stone wall continues to flank the right side of the path. The movement finally leads toward a small wooden shed positioned near a distant stone arch.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a riverside settlement into an expansive rural highland. It begins on a sandy dirt path along a rocky shoreline, moving past timber buildings toward a looming stone arch bridge with the river flowing alongside. As the path shifts, the camera follows Geralt turning left to ascend a steep wooden staircase built into a cliff face, leaving the water behind as a rock wall rises on the right. The scene then opens at the top of the stairs into a wide landscape of cobblestone paths and thatched cottages. Finally, the view expands to reveal a villager walking ahead against a backdrop of distant forests and mountains under a bright sky.
